title: Crown Princess Mette-Marit of Norway Is Placed on Lung Transplant List
summary_full: News of Crown Princess Mette-Marit’s worsening condition comes as a number of scandals have plunged the royal family into a deep crisis.
summary_public: News of Crown Princess Mette-Marit’s worsening condition comes as a number of scandals have plunged the royal family into a deep crisis.
